mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in CPIAUCSL below 225 signals disinflation, reducing central bank intervention pressure and boosting equity valuations through lower real interest rates over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL falls below 225 despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in PAYEMS and decline in UNRATE indicate tightening labor markets, increasing corporate profit margins and driving S&P 500 returns positively over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint effect of PAYEMS growth and UNRATE decline fails to produce positive returns in 50%+ of cases over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in RSAFS above $380 billion signals strong consumer spending, directly boosting corporate revenues and generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where RSAFS exceeds $380 billion despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly rise in INDPRO above 94.5 indicates improving industrial capacity utilization, reducing inflationary pressures and supporting equity market gains over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in 50%+ of cases where INDPRO exceeds 94.5.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in HOUST below 600 thousand units signals reduced housing demand, lowering construction sector volatility and generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are negative in 60%+ of instances where HOUST falls below 600.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in GDPC1 and RSAFS indicates robust economic expansion, creating positive feedback loops for corporate earnings and driving S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint effect of GDPC1 growth and RSAFS expansion fails to produce positive returns in 50%+ of cases over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in UNRATE below 9% signals labor market tightness, increasing wage pressures that boost consumer spending and generate positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE falls below 9 despite the signal.
